10101011101111001111111010010000110010001000100101011011000001 - ASI: 26

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  100 = 1 * 00
  101 = 1 * 01
  110 = 11 * 0
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0111 = 01 * 11
  10000 = 100 * 00
  10101 = 101 * 01
  11110 = 11 * 110
  1000001 = 10000 * 01
  1010101 = 10101 * 01
  1100100 = 110 * 0100
  01000100 = 0100 * 0100
  10010000 = 100 * 10000
  10101101 = 10101 * 101
  11011110 = 110 * 11110
  011111110 = 0111 * 11110
  101010111011110 = 1010101 * 11011110
  101011011000001 = 10101101 * 1000001
  110010001000100 = 1100100 * 01000100
  01111111010010000 = 011111110 * 10010000
  110010001000100101011011000001 = 110010001000100 * 101011011000001
  10101011101111001111111010010000 = 101010111011110 * 01111111010010000
  10101011101111001111111010010000110010001000100101011011000001 = 10101011101111001111111010010000 * 110010001000100101011011000001
